name: Philosophy

sections.label: Five Additional Philosophy Courses (two must be 300+)
sections.description: Five additional PHL courses; at least two must be numbered 300 or above. With faculty approval, up to two may be taken outside the Philosophy program.

sections.label: Philosophy Colloquium
sections.description: PHL-490 Philosophy Colloquium (non-credit bearing). Required for graduation with the major.

notes: Minimum cumulative 2.0 GPA in all courses counted toward the major. With department approval, up to two of the five elective courses may be from outside the Philosophy program.
